listings.title: Oppo - HA-1 - Headphone Amplifier / DAC Black
listings.body: This is a fantastic Headphone Amp, and not only:  It is also an excellent Digital-to-Analog Converter (DAC) with several inputs (including USB for your phone/tablet, Bluetooth etc). In great condition, both cosmetically and sonically. Comes in original box Read the reviews on-line (I've attached a link to one but there are many more out there) https://www.theabsolutesound.com/articles/oppo-ha-1-desktop-headphone-amplifierdac/ Full description here: https://www.oppodigital.com/headphone-amplifier-ha-1/ Thank you for looking

listings.title: Vintage 1968 SONY STR-6060FW AM/FM Stereo Receiver
listings.body: Cleaned & Lubricate All Of The Switches & Controls. Changed Upgraded (2) Dial Lamps To LED Clean All Of The Knobs By Ultrasonic Cleaner. Functional Checked Services Not Performed: FM Indicator Bulb Needs Replacement Capacitor Replacement Due To Age, Although It Presently Sounds Great In My Opinion Wooden Case Is Chipped On The Top Corner Right Side As Shown The Rest Of The Case Displays Beautifully In My Opinion. Specifications Tuning range: FM, MW Power output: 45 watts per channel into 8Ω (stereo) Frequency response: 20Hz to 60kHz Total harmonic distortion: 0.2% Input sensitivity: 2.1mV (MM), 180mV (line) Signal to noise ratio: 70dB (MM), 100dB (line) Output: 160mV (line) Speaker load impedance: 4Ω to 16Ω Semiconductors: 2 x FET, 60 x silicon transistors, 39 x diodes Dimensions: 440 x 150 x 350mm Text for video Call or Text show contact info

listings.title: RETRO 1965 KLH Model Twenty FM Receiver Turntable Record Player MCM
listings.body: The unit functions but needs restoration: The Turntable runs a bit slow old grease is probably the culprit. The basss plastic knob is cracked. The FM: functions but the sound could be better I'm in a poor reception area. The AUX: I hooked up a bluetooth streamer sounded really good! You can text me I'll send you a video Call or Text show contact info
